title: Pirates the match 3
description: Swap and match gems on your journey with pirates through unknown lands and seas in this addictive and exciting match-3 game. Dig treasures, open chests, fight enemies and fulfil other tasks you are given in each level. Combine gems to create mighty ones and then combine these new gems to create even more powerful ones!
instructions: Swap gems to create rows and columns of at least three Make longer matches to forge mighty new gems Experiment with these new gems and find all possible match combinations
